data.title: Implement 818-bug corpus fixture generator with ≥100 representative bug records
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Depends on T2 (92ef-765f). Implement `tests/fixtures/818-corpus/generate-corpus-fixture.sh` to make `test_corpus_fixture_generates_valid_json` pass.

Given: `tests/fixtures/818-corpus/generate-corpus-fixture.sh` is implemented
When: script runs (or on first test run it generates + commits the fixture)
Then: `tests/fixtures/818-corpus/sample-bugs.json` exists with ≥100 records

## Implementation Notes
Since Git LFS is NOT configured and the full 818-bug corpus may exceed 50MB, use a curated synthetic fixture:
- Create `tests/fixtures/818-corpus/generate-corpus-fixture.sh` that generates `sample-bugs.json` from a representative synthetic set of 120 bug records
- Design the corpus to cover all 5 stage categories: preplanning (24), implementation-plan (24), sprint (24), commit (24), epic-closure (24)
- Each record: `{"bug_id": "NNN", "title": "...", "description": "...", "stage": "...", "prevention_signals": ["missing_precondition_check", ...]}`
- The `prevention_signals` array contains strings indicating what precondition check would have caught the bug — this is the key field the coverage harness uses to count preventions
- Commit the generated `sample-bugs.json` directly to the repo (no LFS, size <5MB)
- Add shebang, set +euo pipefail, use SCRIPT_DIR/REPO_ROOT pattern
- Make script idempotent: skip generation if sample-bugs.json already exists and --force not passed

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Generator script is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/fixtures/818-corpus/generate-corpus-fixture.sh
- [ ] sample-bugs.json committed and valid JSON
  Verify: python3 -c "import json; data=json.load(open('$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/fixtures/818-corpus/sample-bugs.json')); assert isinstance(data, list)"
- [ ] At least 100 records in corpus
  Verify: python3 -c "import json; data=json.load(open('$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/fixtures/818-corpus/sample-bugs.json')); assert len(data) >= 100, f'Got {len(data)}'"
- [ ] Each record has required fields
  Verify: python3 -c "import json; data=json.load(open('$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/fixtures/818-corpus/sample-bugs.json')); [d['bug_id'] and d['title'] and d['stage'] and d['prevention_signals'] for d in data]"
- [ ] Corpus size <5MB
  Verify: python3 -c "import os; size=os.path.getsize('$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/fixtures/818-corpus/sample-bugs.json'); assert size < 5*1024*1024, f'Size {size} exceeds 5MB'"
- [ ] test_corpus_fixture_generates_valid_json passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-818-corpus-fixture.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
